root.sql: select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') g1, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.prj_flag prj_flag, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.board_type board_type, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.layer_rate layer_rate, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.network_type network_type, tia_alarm_dict3.txt g2, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.vendor_name g3, tia_alarm_dict1.txt g4, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.alarm_title g5, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.unstandard_alarm_num g6, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.probable_cause g7, tfa_alarm_standard_dic.txt g8, tia_alarm_dict2.txt g9 from tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict1 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.eqp_object_class = tia_alarm_dict1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1314) tia_alarm_dict2 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.board_type = tia_alarm_dict2.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 110701) tfa_alarm_standard_dic on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.layer_rate = tfa_alarm_standard_dic.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1037) tia_alarm_dict3 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.network_type = tia_alarm_dict3.id where tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and prj_flag in (#prj_flag#) )a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.countsql: select count(*) from ( select to_char(tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') g1, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.prj_flag prj_flag, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.board_type board_type, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.layer_rate layer_rate, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.network_type network_type, tia_alarm_dict3.txt g2, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.vendor_name g3, tia_alarm_dict1.txt g4, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.alarm_title g5, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.unstandard_alarm_num g6, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.probable_cause g7, tfa_alarm_standard_dic.txt g8, tia_alarm_dict2.txt g9 from tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict1 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.eqp_object_class = tia_alarm_dict1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1314) tia_alarm_dict2 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.board_type = tia_alarm_dict2.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 110701) tfa_alarm_standard_dic on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.layer_rate = tfa_alarm_standard_dic.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1037) tia_alarm_dict3 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.network_type = tia_alarm_dict3.id where tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and prj_flag in (#prj_flag#) )

Conditions.Condition: select '工程' as text,0 as value from dual union select '非工程' as text,1 as value from dual

root.detailSql: select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.fp0 w1, tia_alarm_dict1.txt w2, tia_alarm_dict2.txt w3, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.eqp_label w4, tia_alarm_dict3.txt w5, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.ne_label w6, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.alarm_title_text w7, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.probable_cause w8, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.org_severity w9, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.alarm_resource_status w10, tia_alarm_dict5.txt w11, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.province_name w12, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.region_name w13, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.city_name w14, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.standard_alarm_id w15, to_char(tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.event_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w16, to_char(tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.cancel_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w17, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.vendor_name w18, tia_alarm_dict4.txt w19 from tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2 tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2 left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =1037) tia_alarm_dict1 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.network_type = tia_alarm_dict1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.eqp_object_class = tia_alarm_dict2.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict3 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.object_class = tia_alarm_dict3.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1314) tia_alarm_dict4 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.board_type = tia_alarm_dict2.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 110701) tia_alarm_dict5 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.layer_rate = tia_alarm_dict5.id where tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.event_time >= to_date('@g1@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.event_time <to_date('@g1@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') +1 and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.alarm_title_text = '@g5@' and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.eqp_object_class = @eqp_object_class@ and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.network_type = @network_type@ and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.vendor_name = '@g3@' and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.probable_cause = '@g7@' and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.layer_rate = @layer_rate@ and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.board_type = @board_type@ and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.alarm_resource_status = @prj_flag@ {0} )a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.detailCountSql: select count(*) from (select tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.fp0 w1, tia_alarm_dict1.txt w2, tia_alarm_dict2.txt w3, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.eqp_label w4, tia_alarm_dict3.txt w5, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.ne_label w6, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.alarm_title_text w7, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.probable_cause w8, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.org_severity w9, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.alarm_resource_status w10, tia_alarm_dict5.txt w11, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.province_name w12, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.region_name w13, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.city_name w14, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.standard_alarm_id w15, to_char(tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.event_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w16, to_char(tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.cancel_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w17, tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.vendor_name w18, tia_alarm_dict4.txt w19 from tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2 tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2 left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =1037) tia_alarm_dict1 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.network_type = tia_alarm_dict1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.eqp_object_class = tia_alarm_dict2.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict3 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.object_class = tia_alarm_dict3.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1314) tia_alarm_dict4 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.board_type = tia_alarm_dict4.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 110701) tia_alarm_dict5 on tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.layer_rate = tia_alarm_dict5.id where tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.event_time >= to_date('@g1@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.event_time <to_date('@g1@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') +1 and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.alarm_title_text = '@g5@' and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.eqp_object_class = @eqp_object_class@ and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.network_type = @network_type@ and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.vendor_name = '@g3@' and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.probable_cause = '@g7@' and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.layer_rate = @layer_rate@ and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.board_type = @board_type@ and tfa_alarm_nostandard_detail2.alarm_resource_status = @prj_flag@ {0} )
